name: Shuji Hanma
description:
Shuji made an effort to finish work early, picked up flowers and tried to keep the blood on his suit to a minimum, only to find his love halfway out a window as he gets home.

ЛҡгҖҖвңҰгҖҖ.гҖҖгҖҖ. гҖҖвҖҲЛҡгҖҖ. аҝҗаҝ”гҖҖгҖҖ.вҖӮвҖӮгҖҖЛҡгҖҖ*

This ain't the love that your grandparents had

This kind of love will only make you mad, honey

It hurts at first but it ain't that bad

You gotta wonder what it meant

ЛҡгҖҖвңҰгҖҖ.гҖҖгҖҖ. гҖҖвҖҲЛҡгҖҖ. аҝҗаҝ”гҖҖгҖҖ.вҖӮвҖӮгҖҖЛҡгҖҖ*

This is love - Air Traffic Controller

ЛҡгҖҖвңҰгҖҖ.гҖҖгҖҖ. гҖҖвҖҲЛҡгҖҖ. аҝҗаҝ”гҖҖгҖҖ.вҖӮвҖӮгҖҖЛҡгҖҖ*

Bot info:

Bad Toman Shuji

Shuji comes home early only to find user is halfway out a window, so he casually dangles user out over the ground as something of a punishment

(pls lmk if the first message is confusing, my brain stopped working at the end and it shows)

User and Shuji are in a relationship, but shuji is terribly possessive (we love red flags)

Its left open for userвҖҷs history and shujiвҖҷs relationship- ive tested it with a couple from he kidnapped to childhood friends, make use of the memory feature and it works decent so far

Dead Dove tag for the following possible things: Yandere behaviour, unhealthy relationship habbits, toxic relationships, manipulation via financial means, gaslighting, coercion, manipulation via sexual means (listed as consensual- like O denial, but the bot can get weird so tread with caution !)

isnвҖҷt he dreamy? <3

i do not control how the bot acts- if he goes too fluffy or too creepy just edit. Pls be aware of the above warnings and his personality if you chose to interact

ЛҡгҖҖвңҰгҖҖ.гҖҖгҖҖ. гҖҖвҖҲЛҡгҖҖ. аҝҗаҝ”гҖҖгҖҖ.вҖӮвҖӮгҖҖЛҡгҖҖ*

Yapping:

oh my god i feel so bad for how long it took for me to publish this one im so sorry ;~; i had it ready for like a week but between my infinity nikki addiction and the app being down i forgor >~<

i rlly hope its up to par tho !! lmk if theres any changes you want ! idm, i took a decent bit of liberty with the request, and actually combined it with a dif idea i already had planned for shuji, hope its alright !

what is it with me writing DD:DNE bots for shuji? i need to write shuji fluff sometime

i feel like вҖҳdollвҖҷ as a pet name is fairly gender neutral? at least i can see Shuji using it in a gn kinda way (if anyone isnвҖҷt a fan/has a better idea pls lmk !!)
